data.markdown:
## SAVANT SMART PANEL

Making Every Electrical Panel Smart

[Get Started](https://www.savant.com/power/getting-started/)

## MAKE YOUR ELECTRICAL PANEL A SMART PANEL

With the Savant Smart Panel system, there's no need to rewire your home, replace your electrical panel, or add a subpanel. Savant Power Modules easily integrate into any standard electrical panel, working with your existing circuits to monitor energy use, send notifications for breaker trips or outages, and deliver power precisely where and when you need it—all in real time.

[Download Specs](https://www.savant.com/resources-energy)

## NO NEED TO REWIRE YOUR HOME

There’s no need to rewire your home or install an expensive, proprietary breaker panel. To monitor or manage specific loads and power sources, simply install the necessary power modules for the circuits you want to prioritize.

## FITS IN ALL MAJOR PANELS

Each Savant Power Module comes in variants that fit in any major style of electrical panel. Whether your home uses a QO™, Eaton CH™, or 1-Inch style load center, we’ve got you covered with a module that plugs right in, with options for pigtail or plug-on neutral connectors.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='860'%20width='418'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/2e63551499fd595f1b60a02403e9d488/58487/ev-scenes-smartbudget2_1.png)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='520'%20width='1680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/10f726e966d20705af2584140802017d/edde2/panelbackground.png)

## REMAIN WITHIN BUDGET WHEN OFF GRID

During a power outage, your backup power source or inverter may limit your available energy. The Savant Smart Panel helps users stay within their energy budget by efficiently managing limited power availability.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='2680'%20width='2680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/2241aaa43f00e375096a8cdd0388afa8/104b1/120v_relay.png)

### Dual Relay

Controls and monitors up to two 20 amp circuits. Ideal for outlets, kitchen appliances, lighting, and more.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='2680'%20width='2680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/b999b6f77ecc4ca9605fc14086a11642/104b1/240v_relay.png)

### 2-Pole Relay 240V 30 AMP

Controls and monitors a single circuit up to 30 amps. Ideal for larger appliances such as washers or dryers.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='2680'%20width='2680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/dc206decb1bb698654f1c904e3c06619/104b1/240v_2_pole_relay.png)

### 2-POLE RELAY 240V 60A

Controls and monitors a single circuit up to 60 amps. Ideal for heating and cooling equipment, sub-panels, or EV chargers.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='2680'%20width='2680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/2241aaa43f00e375096a8cdd0388afa8/104b1/120v_relay.png)

### CURRENT TRACK MODULE

Savant’s Current Track Module monitors a single 2-pole 240V circuit up to 800 amps (requires applicable current transformers, sold separately). Ideal for monitoring larger circuits that do not require control, such as the main feed into the panel or output from solar.

## KNOWLEDGE IS POWER

In addition to energy monitoring and flexible control of backup sources during an outage, Savant Power Modules help you to stay informed, with instant personalized mobile alerts that let you know when a breaker has been tripped, or when the grid goes down.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='843'%20width='840'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/0aa91d9b64525c41308523f4d448381e/3fe2a/background_image_practical_application.png)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='701'%20width='562'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/8b5b3fea392736793901f02a67cee8db/7cf81/breaker_tripped.png)

## PANEL Compatibility

Savant works closely with the best in the business. From circuit breaker panels to batteries, generators and inverters, you can trust our partners to deliver the best of the best. Savant Power Modules are designed to work with electrical distribution panels from all major manufacturers, most likely including the one in your home.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='660'%20width='660'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/835a47e8995a3f6344999a860faf4e50/3c9ef/schneider.png)

# Starting a project? Let's talk.

Lead SourceSavant Website \| Lead Record TypeSavant Services Request

Savant now offers **personal smart home consultations** to help you start your project quickly and smoothly.

All we need is your contact info and some details on what you are interested in so we can match you up with the perfect Savant install consultant.

Do you have Savant in your home already?
